name: Shapeshifter
description: '''Shapeshifter''' (sometimes referred to as '''New Zealand Shapeshifter''') are a live [[ Drum and bass|heavy soul electronic music]] act from [[New Zealand]]. They are known for their live shows and blend of heavy soul with a mix of drum and bass. They have made appearances at [[Glastonbury]], The Big Chill, [[Big Day Out]], [[Parklife Music Festival|Parklife]] plus sold-out performances across Europe, Australia and New Zealand.
